sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47121" key="h(mi/kleistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμί-κλειστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47121.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-shut</tr_>, prob.l. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμικλεῖς</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
